title: Zoro’s Promise Is Revealed
description: On pages 8–10, this part centers on Zoro’s endurance, Helmeppo’s cruelty, and Luffy’s decision to recruit the captured swordsman.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Zolo is O FOR 2000 AGAINST KUINA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kind OF WEAK FOR A BOY, AREN'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah! He's the STRONGEST in our dojo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: HE'S EVEN STRONGER THAN THE GROWN-UPS

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That so? Well, he's not as strong as me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even if he can use two swords, he's still weak!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: LOSERS SHOULD LEARN TO SUFFER DEFEAT IN SILENCE.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SHE THINKS SHE'S SO GREAT JUST BECAUSE SHE'S THE SENSEL'S DAUGHTER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's odd because you are actually very strong.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: SENSE!! ARE YOU TEACHING HER SECRET TRICKS BECAUSE SHE'S YOUR DAUGHTER!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Why can't I beat that girl!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: DON'T FORGET THAT KUINA IS A LITTLE OLDER THAN YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm going to sail the seas and become the greatest sword master in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I can't keep losing to that girl!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
